createProject.title: Create a new project
createProject.description: Create a new project in your workspace by providing a name, key, and selecting an icon.

createTask.chooseProjectForImages: Choose a project before uploading images.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your workspace
signIn.invitationSubtitle: Sign in to accept your invitation
signIn.invitationAlert: After signing in, you'll be able to accept your workspace invitation.
signIn.registrationDisabled: Public registration is disabled. Use an invitation to create an account.
signIn.passwordRegistrationDisabled: Password registration is disabled. Use a configured social or OIDC sign-in method to create an account.

signIn.oidcError: Failed to sign in with OIDC
signIn.googleError: Failed to sign in with Google
signIn.githubError: Failed to sign in with GitHub
signIn.discordError: Failed to sign in with Discord

errors.account_not_linked: This identity could not be linked to the existing account. Sign in by email to verify the account, then try SSO again. If email sign-in is unavailable, contact your administrator.
errors.oauth_code_verification_failed: OAuth verification failed. Please try again.
errors.registration_is_currently_disabled_you_n: Registration is currently disabled. You need a valid invitation to create an account.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.inboxMessage: We've sent you a temporary login link. Please check your inbox at <email>{{email}}</email>.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitleInvitation: Create an account to accept your invitation

signUp.passwordDisabledAlert: Password-based account creation is disabled. Use a configured social or OIDC sign-in method from the sign-in page.

verifyOtp.subtitle: Use the 6-digit code sent to your email to continue

otpSignIn.codeSent: Verification code sent! Check your email.

onboarding.createWorkspaceSubtitle: Set up your workspace to start managing projects
onboarding.descriptionPlaceholder: What does your team work on?

profileSetup.subtitle: Please enter your name to get started

validation.nameShort: Name must be at least 2 characters

informationPage.title: Personal Information
informationPage.subtitle: Manage your personal details and account information.
informationPage.sectionSubtitle: Manage your profile and account details.

validation.nameShort: Name must be at least 2 characters

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.subtitle: Choose how Kaneo delivers your account notifications and which channels to use.
notificationsPage.emailDescription: Use your account email as the destination for notifications.
notificationsPage.accountEmailHint: Email delivery always goes to the signed-in account email.
notificationsPage.ntfyDescription: Publish account notifications to an ntfy topic.
notificationsPage.ntfyTokenHintConfigured: A token is already configured ({{masked}}). Enter a new token to replace it.
notificationsPage.ntfyTokenHintOptional: Optional. Provide a token if your ntfy server requires authentication.
notificationsPage.gotifyDescription: Send account notifications to your Gotify server.
notificationsPage.gotifyTokenHintConfigured: An app token is already configured ({{masked}}). Enter a new token to replace it.
notificationsPage.gotifyTokenHintRequired: Required. Use an application token from your Gotify server.
notificationsPage.webhookDescription: Send account notifications to your own endpoint as JSON.
notificationsPage.webhookSecretHintConfigured: A signing secret is already configured ({{masked}}). Enter a new one to replace it.
notificationsPage.webhookSecretHintOptional: Optional. Kaneo signs the request body when a secret is set.
notificationsPage.workspaceRulesDescription: Reuse your global channels, then decide which workspaces and projects are allowed to send account notifications.
notificationsPage.workspaceCardHint: Choose which channels this workspace can use for account notifications.
notificationsPage.eventPreferencesDescription: Choose which task events create in-app notifications and can be delivered to your connected channels.
notificationsPage.eventCommentsHint: Includes new comments on tasks assigned to you and direct @mentions.
notificationsPage.reminderLeadTimeLabel: Remind me before the due date
notificationsPage.reminderLeadTimeHint: Between 1 hour and 30 days before. Overdue notifications are sent separately.
notificationsPage.reminderLeadTimeInvalid: Enter a whole number between 1 and {{max}}.
notificationsPage.emailChannelHintEnabled: Send matching workspace notifications by email.
notificationsPage.emailChannelHintDisabled: Configure and enable email globally first.
notificationsPage.ntfyChannelHintEnabled: Send matching workspace notifications to ntfy.
notificationsPage.ntfyChannelHintDisabled: Configure and enable ntfy globally first.
notificationsPage.gotifyChannelHintEnabled: Send matching workspace notifications to Gotify.
notificationsPage.gotifyChannelHintDisabled: Configure and enable Gotify globally first.
notificationsPage.webhookChannelHintEnabled: Send matching workspace notifications to your webhook.
notificationsPage.webhookChannelHintDisabled: Configure and enable the webhook globally first.
notificationsPage.projectScopeDescription: All projects are included by default. Narrow it down if this workspace should only send notifications from selected projects.
notificationsPage.allProjectsDescription: Deliver notifications from every project in this workspace.
notificationsPage.selectedProjectsDescription: Only deliver notifications from chosen projects.
notificationsPage.noProjectsInWorkspace: No projects available for this workspace yet.
notificationsPage.toastRuleSaveFailed: Failed to save workspace notification rule
notificationsPage.toastRuleRemoveFailed: Failed to remove workspace notification rule

preferencesPage.subtitle: Customize your Kaneo experience.
preferencesPage.firstDayOfWeekDescription: Choose whether calendars and weekly ranges start on Sunday or Monday
preferencesPage.defaultViewDescription: Choose your preferred task view mode
preferencesPage.displayOptionsDescription: Choose which information to show in task views
preferencesPage.assigneesDescription: Show who is assigned to tasks

developerPage.title: Developer Settings
developerPage.subtitle: Manage your API keys and developer resources.
developerPage.apiKeysCardDescription: Create and manage API keys for programmatic access to Kaneo.

createdModal.title: API Key Created
createdModal.description: Your API key "{{keyName}}" has been created successfully.
createdModal.alertTitle: Success! Your API key has been created
createdModal.alertDescription: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again.

table.empty: No API keys yet. Create one to get started.
table.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete {{name}}.

createDialog.title: Create API Key
createDialog.description: Create a new API key to access the Kaneo API programmatically.
createDialog.nameDescription: A descriptive name for this API key
createDialog.expirationDescription: Choose how long this API key should remain valid. Never will create a key without an automatic expiry.

validation.nameShort: Name must be at least 3 characters

workspaceGeneral.title: General Settings
workspaceGeneral.subtitle: Manage your workspace name and description.
workspaceGeneral.workspaceInfoSubtitle: Configure your workspace details and preferences.
workspaceGeneral.descriptionHint: A brief description of your workspace
workspaceGeneral.deleteWorkspaceDescription: Schedule workspace to be permanently deleted
workspaceGeneral.deleteModalDescription: This will permanently delete the workspace "{{name}}" and all its data. This action cannot be undone.

validation.nameShort: Workspace name must be at least 2 characters

workspaceRoles.title: Roles
workspaceRoles.subtitle: Define which actions members can perform in {{workspaceName}}.
workspaceRoles.noAccess: You need admin or owner permissions to manage workspace roles.
workspaceRoles.sectionSubtitle: Edit the default roles or add a tailored one. Members keep their assigned role name across edits.
workspaceRoles.emptyDescription: Default roles will appear here once they're seeded for this workspace.
workspaceRoles.defaultRoleHelp: Default role — name is reserved and the row can't be deleted.

defaultRoleDescriptions.viewer: Can view and comment on tasks.
defaultRoleDescriptions.member: Can create and manage tasks and projects.
defaultRoleDescriptions.admin: Has full access to the workspace.

validation.nameExists: A role with this name already exists
validation.permissionRequired: At least one permission must be selected

deleteDialog.title: Delete role
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently delete the role "{{role}}". Members assigned to this role will lose its permissions.

workspaceLabels.title: Labels
workspaceLabels.subtitle: Create, edit, and delete workspace-level labels.
workspaceLabels.cardDescription: Manage labels that can be assigned to tasks.
workspaceLabels.createDescription: Create a new label that can be used across tasks in this workspace.
workspaceLabels.editDescription: Update the name or color of this label.
workspaceLabels.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently remove this label from all tasks. This action cannot be undone.
workspaceLabels.empty: No labels yet. Create your first label to get started.

workspaceAuditLog.title: Audit log
workspaceAuditLog.description: Who did what and when across this workspace.
workspaceAuditLog.noAccessDescription: Only workspace admins can view the audit log.
workspaceAuditLog.emptyDescription: Changes to projects, columns and tasks will appear here.

projectGeneral.title: General Settings
projectGeneral.subtitle: Manage your project name, key, icon and description.
projectGeneral.projectInfoSubtitle: Configure your project details and preferences.
projectGeneral.iconHint: Displayed in the sidebar and project surfaces.
projectGeneral.descriptionHint: A brief description of your project
projectGeneral.deleteProjectDescription: Schedule project to be permanently deleted
projectGeneral.deleteModalDescription: This will permanently delete the project "{{name}}" and all its data. This action cannot be undone.

validation.nameShort: Project name must be at least 2 characters
validation.keyShort: Key must be at least 2 characters
validation.keyMax: Key must be at most 8 characters

projectIntegrations.title: Project Integrations
projectIntegrations.subtitle: Connect your project with external tools and services to streamline your workflow.
projectIntegrations.githubSectionSubtitle: Synchronize tasks with GitHub issues and enable two-way sync.
projectIntegrations.giteaSectionSubtitle: Synchronize tasks with a self-hosted Gitea instance (issues, PRs, webhooks).
projectIntegrations.discordSectionSubtitle: Send project task updates into a Discord channel with a webhook.
projectIntegrations.genericWebhookSectionSubtitle: Send project task events to any HTTP endpoint as JSON.
projectIntegrations.slackSectionSubtitle: Send project task updates into a Slack channel with an incoming webhook.
projectIntegrations.telegramSectionSubtitle: Send project task updates into a Telegram chat or topic with a bot.

projectVisibility.title: Visibility
projectVisibility.subtitle: Control who can view and access your project.
projectVisibility.sectionSubtitle: Toggle public access and share the public URL.
projectVisibility.publicAccessHint: Allow anyone with the URL to view this project
projectVisibility.publicUrlHint: Share this link if the project is public

projectWorkflow.title: Workflow
projectWorkflow.subtitle: Configure board columns and automation rules for this project.
projectWorkflow.columnsDescription: Manage the columns that appear on your board. Drag to reorder. Turn on "Done column" for stages that represent completed work.
projectWorkflow.automationDescription: Map integration events to columns. When an event occurs, the linked task moves to the specified column.

projectWorkflowTransitions.title: Workflow transitions
projectWorkflowTransitions.description: Restrict which columns tasks can move to from each column.
projectWorkflowTransitions.noColumns: Create columns first to configure transitions.
projectWorkflowTransitions.hint: Columns with no targets selected allow moving tasks to any column.

columnEditor.doneColumnTooltip: Treat this as a done column

genericWebhookIntegration.connectionHint: Send task events to your own endpoint as JSON. A signed X-Kaneo-Signature header is included when a secret is configured.
genericWebhookIntegration.webhookHint: Kaneo sends POST requests with a JSON payload for each enabled event.
genericWebhookIntegration.secretHint: Optional. If provided, Kaneo signs the request body and sends the hex digest in the X-Kaneo-Signature header.
genericWebhookIntegration.secretHintConfigured: A signing secret is already configured ({{secret}}). Enter a new one to replace it.
genericWebhookIntegration.eventsHint: Choose which project changes should trigger outgoing webhooks.
genericWebhookIntegration.reminderLeadTimeLabel: Send the webhook this many hours before

validation.botTokenInvalid: Enter a valid Telegram bot token
validation.threadIdInvalid: Enter a valid Telegram topic thread ID

telegramIntegration.chatIdHint: Enter the Telegram chat ID or channel username where updates should be posted.
telegramIntegration.threadIdHint: Optional. Use this for forum topics inside Telegram groups.
telegramIntegration.chatLabelHint: Optional label for your reference inside Kaneo.
telegramIntegration.eventsHint: Choose which project changes should post to Telegram.
